features.name: Pulse
features.description: Activity feed with notes, social posts, and agent activity

features.name: Workspace Rail
features.description: Far-left rail for switching relays with cross-relay unread indicators

features.name: Forum Channels
features.description: Forum-style threaded channels for long-form discussions

features.name: Scroll settle gate
features.description: Defer the mid-history re-anchor until scrolling settles (k consecutive still frames) instead of correcting mid-fling — smoother momentum scrolling on WebKit. At rest, identical to today; only under a live fling is the reading row held until the fling ends, then snapped once at settle.
